what_was_built: reports/crypto_d1_manual_dataset_intake_runbook_v1/runbook.json (the machine-readable operator runbook: documents operator decisions before data enters, the 6 Bundle-18 source-class dispositions with E+F rejected, the 16 required concrete inputs incl. the 9 CSV columns + manifest/CHECKSUMS/FREEZE_RECORD/fees, an 8-step file placement procedure, the 3 Bundle-19 QA CLI commands, all 6 QA statuses, why QA_PASS authorizes nothing, what must happen after QA, the forbidden list, and pipeline safe/repeatable/auditable rules; authorization_disclaimer pins six 'authorizes nothing' booleans True; eleven safety flags pinned False; research_only + read_only True)

reports/crypto_d1_manual_dataset_intake_runbook_v1/runbook.md (human-readable runbook with disclaimer header and sections 0-13: pipeline position, lane/scope, operator decisions, source-class disposition table, required-inputs table, file placement, QA CLI, QA status meanings, why QA_PASS authorizes nothing, post-QA-before-baseline, forbidden list, pipeline safety, registry status, no-profit-claim policy)

tools/crypto_d1_manual_dataset_intake_runbook_check.py (stdlib-only validator; argparse/json/pathlib only; validate + show subcommands; verifies schema, the eleven False safety flags, the six True disclaimer booleans, lane/assets/market/timeframe/calendar, 9 CSV columns, all 6 source classes disposed with E+F rejected, the required concrete inputs, the 3 QA CLI commands, all 6 QA statuses, forbidden-list categories, registry-stays-WATCH, safety-boundary phrases, MD distinction phrases, and absence of forbidden capability phrases)

tests/test_crypto_d1_manual_dataset_intake_runbook.py (stdlib + pytest; existence + validation, safety-flag + disclaimer pins, scope, CSV columns, source-class dispositions, required inputs, QA CLI, QA statuses, forbidden list, registry-stays-WATCH, no-real-data + no-data-directory invariants, no forbidden phrases, distinction phrases, validator failure-mode tests, validator stdlib-only + no-network/broker/exchange import scan, CLI smoke, and integration that prior Crypto-D1/arbitrage/registry/next-bundle validators still pass and crypto_d1 remains WATCH now listing the runbook docs)
files_NOT_changed: tools/strategy_next_bundle.py (NOT modified -- no artificial selection nudge)
All prior Crypto-D1 spec docs (Bundles 11-19) + arbitrage validators NOT modified
data/crypto_d1_research/ NOT created (the runbook is documentation; no data path is created)

scope_summary.pipeline_position: Bridges Bundle 17 (acquisition authorization gate) to Bundle 19 (QA runtime tool); documentation of the manual operator intake phase; adds no automation.

candidate_registry_status_after_build.note: The crypto_d1_protocol seed extra_files were extended with runbook.md + runbook.json for traceability only. The lane stays WATCH; evidence does NOT become STRONG; the candidate is NOT marked ACTIVE. Promotion to ACTIVE still requires a future per-strategy backtest report PASS verdict on REAL data + explicit operator decision.

what_was_executed_in_this_bundle: ONLY the new validator (validate + show) and the test suite. NO real dataset was acquired, placed, QA-checked, or backtested. No data directory was created.
recommended_next_bundle: **Operator step (NOT a bundle):** operator follows this runbook to choose a source class (A/B/C/D), acquire BTC/ETH/SOL daily-spot CSV offline, place files under data/crypto_d1_research/<dataset_id>/<dataset_version>/, author manifest.json + CHECKSUMS.txt + FREEZE_RECORD.txt + fees.json, then run `python tools/crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py run --dataset-dir <PATH> --out-dir <PATH>` and review the qa_report. SPARTA does NOT automate any of these steps.

**Crypto-D1 Baseline Results Report v1** (separately authorized; only AFTER operator has supplied data, reached QA_PASS or accepted QA_WARN, and run the backtest runner to produce output; documents the operator-reviewed run + pins verdict + caveats. Spec bundle; Claude works.)

**Crypto-D1 Backtest Runner v2 (future)** -- walk-forward + per-family parameter sweep + structured sensitivity sweep + per-strategy report emitter matching the full 27-field Bundle 15 schema. (Code bundle; recommend Codex.)
no_profit_claim_policy: A runbook is not strategy validation.
Manual intake does not imply edge.
Clean daily OHLCV data does not imply profit.
A runbook cannot authorize backtesting by itself.
A runbook cannot authorize paper or live trading.
No data fetch is authorized by this runbook.
A good historical chart does not imply future returns.
